scope_note: QA Spread Period Cert family [128]: certifies that the QA cosmos orbit period for modulus m equals the Pisano period pi(m) of the Fibonacci sequence modulo m (= order of Fibonacci shift F=[[0,1],[1,1]] in GL2(Z/mZ)); pi(3)=8, pi(7)=16, pi(9)=24; the spread polynomial S_n(s) in F_m cycles back to s after pi(m) steps because S_n(sin^2(theta))=sin^2(n*theta) and the angle group has order pi(m). Source: Wildberger arXiv:0911.1025 (Spread Polynomials), arXiv:0909.1377 (UHG I), arXiv:math/0701338 (1D Metrical Geometry); QA mathematical structure.
